finding: Extraction yield is party-balanced CONDITIONAL on a release yielding claims (7.1 Dem vs 7.3 Rep claims/release), correcting the earlier '1.4 vs 2.4' figure. Republican AI releases more often yield ZERO claims because they are procedural bill announcements the extractor correctly declines -- consistent with the check-worthiness precision (high precision, conservative recall). So the per-claim partisan comparison is not driven by a yield asymmetry in extraction.
